creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #24)

No, sorry. Between that comment and the "tomorrow" it references, I turned the devkit into an essential part of my home network and can't quite reboot it as liberally as I'd need. I was really hoping they'd announce a 2024 version since the 2023's been out of stock for months; I'd like to pick one up for debugging stuff like this and general use after that. Alas, no such luck.
